global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and a short tail. It has a distinctive yellow belly and olive-green upperparts. The wings and tail are darker with subtle white wing bars. The head is rounded with a short, broad bill and a slight eye ring.

part_details.belly: Bright yellow, smooth texture, rounded shape.
part_details.upperparts: Olive-green, matte, covering back and wings.
part_details.wings: Darker olive with subtle white bars, medium length.
part_details.head: Rounded, olive-green with a slight eye ring.

spatial_relations: The yellow belly is positioned below the olive-green upperparts.
The wings extend laterally from the sides of the body.
The short tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
The head is positioned at the top of the body, above the belly.
